title: babiana pubescens
intro: Babiana pubescens, also known as the hairy babiana or hairy gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Babiana pubescens has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting against bacterial infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions or tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
